title: Ultra-Fast Scan & Fluid Adjustments
message: This update introduces massive performance optimizations, refined multi-page state rendering, and an updated modern design system.
points: ⚡ High-Speed Isolate Cropping: Migrated perspective cropping and canvas rectification pipelines to background workers to guarantee lag-free, high-quality document exports.
🎨 Workspace State Synchronization: Redesigned document workspaces to utilize dedicated, independent page trackers, completely resolving rendering layout assertions during multi-card edits.

title: ⚡ The Instant Launch & Optimization Update! 🚀✨
message: We have engineered a highly requested toggle to fully skip the intro splash screen alongside major internal security, ad stability, and performance upgrades! 🛠️
points: ⚡ Instant App Launch: Added a permanent toggle switch in Settings to skip the video intro and boot straight into your scanning dashboard dynamically.
🎬 Memory Leak Protection: Restructured intro playback logic to securely stop video controllers when skipped, preventing background memory drain.
🎯 Smart Session Reviews: Refactored store rating prompt loops to safely prioritize request cycles based on actual application usage frequencies seamlessly.

title: ✨ The Continuous Layout Update! 📜🚀
message: We have engineered an incredibly elegant, new layout option that stitches your scanned pages vertically into a beautiful continuous single-sheet document layout! 🌿
points: 📜 One-Page Document Mode: Combine all scanned pages vertically into a single continuous vertical document layout option automatically.
📐 Unified Aspect Alignment: Every page image scales to match reference dimensions cleanly to enforce perfect, flat uniform borders side-by-side.
💾 Memory Optimization Protection: Smart memory safety limits protect compilation workflows from heavy background lag or runtime device crashes.
🔒 Enhanced Connection Shield: Updated error handling keeps editing platforms stable with alert prompts for uninterrupted premium safety loops.

title: ✨ The Smart Update Hub! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest scanning tools and features. 🌿
points: 🔔 Smart In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Check your update status anytime with the new button next to your streak counter.
⚡ Performance Boost: UI polish and under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother experience.
